description: Lock the 2026-06-24 correction of horticulture to Ohalo II small-scale trial cultivation rather than a generic era-default placeholder or fire-control lineage.

checks.reason: The corrected node is anchored to the 23,000-year-old Ohalo II trial-cultivation evidence.
The Ohalo II evidence includes glossed flint blades used for planned wild-cereal harvesting.
The cultivation evidence is tied to gathered wild cereals, plant identification, grinding, and harvesting.
The broad advanced-hunter-gatherer node is later-dated than the Ohalo II cultivation anchor and should not be a direct prerequisite.
Fire control is not part of the source-backed Ohalo II cultivation mechanism.
